name: Tako
description: Data visualization agent that creates, discovers, and analyzes interactive charts. Searches a knowledge base of 100K+ charts and creates custom visualizations from raw data using 15+ chart types.

skills.name: Search Charts
skills.description: Search Tako's knowledge base for existing charts and data visualizations on any topic including economics, finance, demographics, and technology.
examples: Find charts about US GDP growth
Search for Intel vs Nvidia revenue comparison

skills.name: Create Chart
skills.description: Create a new interactive chart from raw data. Supports timeseries, bar charts, scatter plots, pie charts, maps, heatmaps, treemaps, and more.
examples: Create a bar chart of revenue by region
Make a timeseries chart of stock prices
Build a choropleth map of population by state

skills.name: Analyze Chart
skills.description: Get AI-generated insights and analysis for any chart, including trend identification, outlier detection, and key takeaways.
examples: What are the key trends in this chart?
Summarize the insights from this visualization

skills.name: Explore Data
skills.description: Discover available entities, metrics, cohorts, and time periods in Tako's knowledge graph to understand what data is available.
examples: What tech company data is available?
What cohorts like S&P 500 are available?
